brand.name: spatial-probe
brand.thesis: 3D is queryable, updatable state, not the render.

home.metaTitle: spatial-probe — the spatial data engine for AV and robotics
home.metaDescription: Query, measure, and trust 3D scene state by what it physically means — free-space, clearance, corridor width, dynamics — with every number you can re-run.

hero.title: Query, measure, and trust 3D scene state by what it physically means.
hero.lead: Free-space, clearance, corridor width, dynamics — geometry an object-box pipeline cannot express, with every number you can re-run. The spatial data engine for AV and robotics.

gap.label: the gap
gap.body: Object-box pipelines store boxes. Planners drive through free space. spatial-probe measures the free space — a wall <clearance></clearance> beside the ego that box-only never sees, because its nearest object box reads <boxDistance></boxDistance> away.

pipeline.label: the pipeline
pipeline.heading: The pipeline, as capabilities
pipeline.subhead: Six axes of the data pipeline. Two are live. The rest are planned, and the rail says so.

auditable.label: auditable
auditable.heading: Measurement you can audit
auditable.subhead: A vendor whose own audit kills its own results is the one to trust.

reproducible.title: Reproducible
reproducible.body: Every number carries its call. probe_scene(scene, frame, predicate) regenerates it bit-for-bit.

preRegistered.title: Pre-registered
preRegistered.body: Hypothesis, analysis path, and kill criterion are committed before the data. HARKing shows in the diff.

independentlyGraded.title: Independently graded
independentlyGraded.body: H1 holds oracle-free. H3 is inconclusive — audited twice and retracted in public.

access.heading: One engine, three front doors.
access.subhead: Explorer for the eye. A typed predicate for the query. MCP for the agent.

footer.blurb: Runs on Occ3D-nuScenes and a deterministic predicate core. No validated F1 is claimed where no independent oracle exists. Negatives are headlines here, not footnotes.

ingest.name: Ingest
ingest.blurb: Raw multi-sensor logs become 3D state: objects, HD map, occupancy.

search.name: Search
search.blurb: Find scenes by measured physical quantities, reproducibly. No hallucination.

qa.name: QA / Review
qa.blurb: Decide where auto-labels are safe and where a human must look.

loop.name: Curation / Loop
loop.blurb: Pick what to fix and what to label so the model actually improves.

asof.title: ASOF
asof.oneLine: Does the converted state preserve action-relevant signal, or only look right? An acceptance gate at the door.

occquery.title: OccQuery
occquery.oneLine: Occupancy-native predicates measure box-blind free-space geometry (clearance, free-width) that object-box query languages cannot express.

gtDistrust.title: GT-distrust
gtDistrust.oneLine: Occlusion geometry predicts which occupancy labels are untrustworthy. A geometric review trigger.

calibration.title: Visibility Calibration
calibration.oneLine: Is the model's confidence honest where the sensor cannot see? Catch the silent overconfidence.

value.title: Value-of-Correction
value.oneLine: Rank scenes by how much fixing a label actually moves the model, not how many are wrong.

dynfield.title: DynField-Necessity
dynfield.oneLine: Which stored motion fields a planner truly needs, and in which moments (cut-in, hard brake, low TTC).

aletheon.metaTitle: Aletheon — find the scenes where the model is wrong
aletheon.metaDescription: An open spatial-failure-search engine whose answers carry a label-free correctness check. Find the frames that break a perception model, in a few lines.

hero.title: Find the scenes where the model is wrong, in a few lines.
hero.lead: An open spatial-failure-search engine whose answers carry a label-free correctness check. You query for a failure mode; every hit comes back tagged with which independent check backs it, and how far to trust it.

query.label: run a query · interactive
query.heading: Run a query, see what breaks the model
query.demoBadge: demo: precomputed over a bounded AV2 subset
query.inputAria: Describe a failure mode to search for

presets.path_blocked_no_box: the path is blocked but no tracked box explains it
presets.box_in_free: a box the occupancy marked free

query.noFrames: No annotated frame in this demo subset — the clusters and the honesty check are still real; only the burned-in render is absent for this signature.

frames.label: the wow · model-eval
frames.heading: Frames that break a detector
frames.legendBefore: Each scene scored against AV2 ground-truth boxes.
frames.honest: Honest: COCO-YOLOv8n detector (NOT trained on AV2) → cross-distribution recall, coarse car/bus/truck→vehicle class map, class-agnostic match. A miss = the detector's recall failure, not an occupancy claim.

differentiator.label: the differentiator · H1
differentiator.heading: Occupancy sees what box-only structurally can't
differentiator.subhead: One scene in the demo where the path is blocked but no tracked box explains it — the failure mode a box-only language has no words for.
differentiator.bevCaptionBefore: Occupancy blocks the ego in-path band at
differentiator.bevCaptionAfter: , and no tracked box within 5 m explains it.

honesty.label: the honesty layer
honesty.heading: Every result says how much to trust it
honesty.subhead: Each failure type is tagged by which independent check backs it. This is the differentiator — no result is presented without its provenance.
honesty.gpuGated: External (BLOCKED-side) unboxed-obstacle recall is GPU-gated — empirically closed solo/CPU this session. Not claimed.

catalogue.label: catalogue · demo scope
catalogue.heading: What the demo actually swept
catalogue.subhead: A bounded subset of the AV2 corpus, stated honestly — not a full-corpus sweep.

footer.blurb: Runs on Argoverse 2 sensor logs. No externally-validated recall is claimed where no independent oracle exists; the only external check on file is the traversal (FP-direction) oracle. Negatives are headlines here, not footnotes.

evidence.metaDescription: Every claim, its verdict, and how it was graded. Negatives included.
evidence.heading: Evidence
evidence.intro: Every claim, its verdict, and how it was graded. Negatives included — measurement-honesty is a feature, not a footnote. The H3 row is a result we audited twice and retracted; it is shown, not buried.

occquery.legend: box-only sees vehicles and peds, occquery sees all

ask.title: Ask occquery
ask.body: Ask in plain language. occquery turns the question into geometric predicates and jumps to the matching frames.

verdictHero.noMeasurement: No measurement available for this frame — occupancy predicate returned null.
verdictHero.surfaceGap: A solid surface {clearance} off the ego that the box pipeline ranges at {boxDistance} — a {gap} gap no box query can name.
verdictHero.boxCloser: Box ranges the nearest object at {boxDistance}; occupancy reads {clearance} of reachable clearance here.
verdictHero.agree: Box and occupancy agree at {boxDistance} lateral — no gap between the two measurements for this frame.
